items.title: Here's a history of Spurs being swept (NBA only)...
items.author: HoopsAnalyst
items.body_excerpt:
Here's a history of Spurs being swept (NBA only)...

76-77: By BOS in 1st
81-82: By LAL in WCF
85-86: By LAL in 1st
87-88: By LAL in 1st
91-92: By PHO in 1st
00-01: By LAL in WCF
09-10: By PHO in 2d
16-17: By GS in WCF

A look at sweeps generally here: hoopsanalyst.com/lebron-the-l...

items.title: The energy around Game 3 tonight is so damn weird. Feels like anything could happen. A 30-point blowout. A controversial call that decides it. A spicy on-court incident. An off-court incident. I don't know. But I'll be shocked if this ends up being a "normal" basketball game.

items.body_excerpt: The energy around Game 3 tonight is so damn weird. Feels like anything could happen. A 30-point blowout. A controversial call that decides it. A spicy on-court incident. An off-court incident. I don't know. But I'll be shocked if this ends up being a "normal" basketball game.
